species: In this study, Ng et al. investigated the maintenance of silent gene states and how the Cd4 gene is stably repressed in CD8+ T cells.
cell_type: In this study, Ng et al. investigated the maintenance of silent gene states and how the Cd4 gene is stably repressed in CD8+ T cells.
sample_source: CAF-1 knockdown (KD) resulted in enhanced Cd4 derepression in CD8+ T cells from mice hypomorphic for Dnmt1.
age: Experiments were performed on male and female mice age 6–12 wk.
sex: Experiments were performed on male and female mice age 6–12 wk.
strain: Cd4-Cre, Dnmt1chip, Dnmt3af/f, and Dnmt3bf/f mouse strains were described previously.
